title: 朝日杯FSの後に・熱い期待

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki does great at the Asahi Hai F.S.,
boosting everyone's expectations of her
becoming the next Triple Crown Champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A flood of reporters rush to her for interviews,
but she handles them all with practiced ease and
coolness.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to gain more experience racing in a big
event before the Satsuki Sho, so we decide to
take on the Yayoi Sho next.
